'''masaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyelonephritis|pyelonephritis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyelonephritis|pyelonephritis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| masaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || mæsæzæth || mæsæzæj || mæsæzæsh || mæsæzæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || masasazath || masasazaj || masasazash || masasaza
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || masazath || masazaj || masazash || masaza
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || masafzafth || masafzafj || masafzafsh || masafzaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || masazatha || masazaja || masazasha || masazaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || masazath || masazaj || masazash || masaza
|-
| [[Possessive]] || masazathal || masazajal || masazashal || masazakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || masazaathatha || masazaajaja || masazaashasha || masazaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || masazathan || masazajan || masazashan || masazakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || masazathaoro || masazajaoro || masazashaoro || masazakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
